---
title: "bootstrap_memory.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\scripts\bootstrap_memory.py"
loc: 34
complexity: 6
logic_score: 8.27
style_score: 3.60
intel_score: 3.75
overall_score: 3.88
---

## Intent
The `bootstrap_memory.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on bootstrap. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via bootstrap. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 10 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [re](file://re)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.engine.memory_db](file://src.core.engine.memory_db)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `bootstrap`
